The '''Ghost Tide Nebula''' was an astronomical formation taking up nearly a whole quadrant of the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]] near [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Though a handful of trade routes led near the Ghost Tide, travelers were warned to stay away. The nebula's thick cloud completely blocked [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], as well as rendered [[Navigation computer/Legends|Navigation computers]] useless; providing cover for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] to ambush unsuspecting freighters.
